metadata.description:
The person appears to be a male in their 30s, with olive skin and visible pores, particularly on the cheeks and forehead. Their face is an oval shape with a defined jawline. The hair is very short, dark brown, and buzz-cut, with a natural hairline.

The eyes are almond-shaped and a striking light green or hazel, set slightly wide apart. Eyebrows are medium-thick and straight. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip. The mouth features medium-thick lips, with the upper lip slightly thinner than the lower, forming a gentle smile.

There is light stubble visible on the chin and upper lip, and a few small moles or freckles are scattered across the cheeks and forehead. The overall facial structure suggests East Asian features. The person is looking directly at the viewer with a slight, pleasant smile, and their head is angled slightly to the right.
